response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Handled three songs. Disambiguated differences between reference lyrics and actual vocals using hardcoded screen lyrics (e.g., '少しだけ先の景色が' instead of '少しだけ先 消えそうな景色が'). 2. JSON Usage: Fully used the lyrics references, and filled in the missing lyrics for '未来カノネラ' manually. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned to vocal onset/offset, including a visual subtitle for the prominent '雨とペトラ' title card, keeping silence during the instrumental break.

subtitles.original: 響くカノネラ 新しい未来を感じてる
subtitles.english: Resounding Kanonera, I feel a new future.

subtitles.original: コンパクトにすすむしかないでしょ
subtitles.english: We have no choice but to move forward compactly,

subtitles.original: 遠くまで
subtitles.english: far away...

subtitles.original: もっともっと届け この祈りよ 光となって
subtitles.english: Send this prayer further and further, becoming light.

subtitles.original: もっともっと 少しずつでもいい 私という答えを
subtitles.english: More and more, even if it's little by little, the answer that is me...

subtitles.original: もっと もっと もっと...
subtitles.english: More, more, more...

subtitles.original: 雨とペトラ
subtitles.english: [Title: Rain and Petra]

subtitles.original: 誰かが言った いつか空は 灰になって落ちるって
subtitles.english: Someone said that someday the sky would turn to ash and fall.

subtitles.original: 妄想の世の中で 日々を喰らっている
subtitles.english: Consuming my days inside a world of delusions.

subtitles.original: 境界線を引いてしまうのも 共感覚のせいにして
subtitles.english: Blaming synesthesia for having drawn a boundary line,

subtitles.original: 街の灯の海で 居場所を探している
subtitles.english: I search for a place to belong in this sea of city lights.

subtitles.original: どこへ行くにも この足は 退屈に染まって動かない
subtitles.english: No matter where I go, these feet are stained with boredom and won't move.

subtitles.original: 少しだけ先の景色が
subtitles.english: The scenery just a little bit ahead,

subtitles.original: 見たいだけなのに 見たいだけなのに
subtitles.english: even though I just want to see it, even though I just want to see it.

subtitles.original: 雨が降ったら 雨が降ったらきっと 頬を濡らしてしまう
subtitles.english: If it rains, if it rains, it will surely drench my cheeks.

subtitles.original: 枯れてしまった色ですら 愛しくなるのに
subtitles.english: Even the colors that have withered become so lovely to me...

subtitles.original: 目を瞑ったら 目を瞑ったらもっと 遠く霞んでしまう
subtitles.english: If I close my eyes, if I close my eyes, it will surely blur further away.

subtitles.original: ふるさとなった雨の音 笑い飛ばしてくれ
subtitles.english: Laugh away the sound of the rain that has become my home.

subtitles.original: 誰かが言った いつか溜息は 夜に化けて歌を歌う
subtitles.english: Someone said that someday a sigh will turn into the night and sing a song.

subtitles.original: 妄想の世の中で 日々を喰らっている
subtitles.english: Consuming my days inside a world of delusions.

subtitles.original: 優しい嘘をなぞったせいで 離れる声に気付かない
subtitles.english: Because I traced a gentle lie, I don't notice the voice growing distant.

subtitles.original: 溶けた月が足元に落ちて
subtitles.english: The melted moon fell at my feet,

subtitles.original: 静かに揺れていた
subtitles.english: swaying quietly.

subtitles.original: 夜が降ったら 夜が降ったらきっと 今日を責めてしまう
subtitles.english: If night falls, if night falls, I'm sure I'll blame today.

subtitles.original: 満たされない日々のそこで 夢を見ているだけ
subtitles.english: Just dreaming at the bottom of these unfulfilled days.

subtitles.original: 目を逸らしても 目を逸らしてもずっと 後悔と愛の隙間
subtitles.english: Even if I look away, even if I look away, in the gap between regret and love...

subtitles.original: 取り残されてしまう前に 手を伸ばしてくれ
subtitles.english: Before I get left behind, reach out your hand to me.

subtitles.original: 雨が降ったら 雨が降ったらきっと
subtitles.english: If it rains, if it rains, surely...

subtitles.original: 雨が降ったら 雨が降ったらきっと
subtitles.english: If it rains, if it rains, surely...

subtitles.original: 湿るアスファルト背に映して 俯いた
subtitles.english: Reflecting on the damp asphalt behind me, I looked down.

subtitles.original: 一人ぼっちで ただ明日に期待をして
subtitles.english: All alone, just holding expectations for tomorrow.

subtitles.original: 雨が降ったら 雨が降ったらきっと 頬を濡らしてしまう
subtitles.english: If it rains, if it rains, it will surely drench my cheeks.

subtitles.original: 枯れてしまった色ですら 愛しくなるのに
subtitles.english: Even the colors that have withered become so lovely to me...

subtitles.original: 目を瞑ったら 目を瞑ったらもっと 遠く霞んでしまう
subtitles.english: If I close my eyes, if I close my eyes, it will surely blur further away.

subtitles.original: ふるさとなった雨の音 笑い飛ばしてくれ
subtitles.english: Laugh away the sound of the rain that has become my home.

subtitles.original: 繋がっていたいって 信じられる言葉
subtitles.english: Words I can believe, saying I want to stay connected,

subtitles.original: だってもう昨日の僕らにおさらば
subtitles.english: because we already said goodbye to the us of yesterday.

subtitles.original: 青い春を過ごした 遠い稲妻
subtitles.english: We spent our youth like a distant flash of lightning.
